hero.title: Tlhabollo ya Software ya Kgwebo
hero.description: Ditirišo tša kgwebo tša mafelelo ka dipeakanyo tša sebjalebjale, boagišani bja API-pele, le scalability ya leru.

problem.overview: Dihlopha tša kgwebo gantši di rwala mešomo ye bohlokwa go ditshepedišo tše di arogantšwego, go hlola dinako tše telele tša go eta pele, data ye e sa sepelelanego, le tšhomišano ya diatla ya go tura magareng ga mafapha.
problem.painPointsTitle: Bohloko bja Kgwebo bjo bo Boeletšwago
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo Baetapele ba Tlwaelegilego ba se Lebelelago
painPoints: Delivery commitments slip because dependencies across teams are unmanaged
Motheo wa kgwebo o phatlalatšwa go kgabaganya dikanale le ditšweletšwa
Legacy integrations make new feature launches high-risk and slow
impactSignals: Roadmap throughput drops while engineering spend increases
Diphošo tše di lebanego le bareki di oketšega nakong ya go lokollwa
Go tšea diphetho go fokotšega ka lebaka la go se sepelelane le pego ya tshepedišo

approach.overview: We execute with architecture-first discovery, contract-driven delivery, and controlled release engineering so business value is sent in predictable increments.

pillars.title: Domain Modeling & Bounded Contexts
pillars.detail: We map domains to clear service boundaries to reduce cross-team coupling and clear ownership.

pillars.title: API-First Integration Strategy
pillars.detail: Re hlatholla dikontraka tše di tiilego ka pela, go kgontšha tlhabollo ye e swanago le kopanyo ye e bolokegilego le ditshepedišo tša kgwebo.

pillars.title: Progressive Delivery Workflow
pillars.detail: We use feature flags, staged rollouts, and quality gates to release quickly without destabilizing production.

principles.overview: Diphetho tša rena tša boagišane di bea pele lebaka le letelele, go šoma gabotse le go ba mong yo a kwagalago gore dipolatefomo di dule di fetoga ge kgwebo e gola.

items.title: Mellwane ya Tirelo ya Modular
items.detail: Bokgoni bo beakantšwe go dikologa mafelo a kgwebo go boloka khuetšo ya phetogo ya selegae.

items.title: Event-Driven Integration
items.detail: Asynchronous workflows are used where latency tolerance exists to improve resilience and decouple systems.

items.title: Observability by Design
items.detail: Tracing, metrics, and structured logs are defined upfront to support reliable operations and SLA governance.

breakdown.title: Discovery & Architecture
breakdown.summary: Re beakanya dilo tše bohlokwa tša kgwebo, mapheko a sethekniki le dibopego pele ga ge phethagatšo e thoma.
deliverables: Lenaneo la kabo ye e theilwego godimo ga Milestone.

breakdown.title: Build & Integration
breakdown.summary: Dihlopha tša rena di tsenya tirišong dikarolo tša motheo, dikarolo tša kopanyo le dišireletšo tša boleng ka go swana.
deliverables: API le dikgokagano tša mokgatlo wa boraro
Automated testing and release readiness checks

breakdown.title: Launch & Evolution
breakdown.summary: After go-live, we stabilize operations and define the next improvement cycle based on real usage.
deliverables: Tshepedišo ya go šoma le go botega

cta.description: A re hlameng le go tšweletša tharollo yeo e sepelelanago le dipoelo tše di lekalekanego tša kgwebo.

problem.overview: Mekgatlo gantši e kgoboketša bontšhi bjo bogolo bja data eupša e palelwa ke go e fetolela go ponelopele ye e tshephagalago, diphetho tša tshepedišo, goba ditiro tša kgwebo tše di ka lekanywago.
problem.painPointsTitle: Bohloko bja Kgwebo bjo bo Boeletšwago
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo Baetapele ba Tlwaelegilego ba se Lebelelago
painPoints: Tlhalošo ya go bega e fapana go ya ka dihlopha, gomme seo se feletša ka dikanegelo tša KPI tše di thulanago
Models remain in experimentation and never reach production workflows
Mathata a boleng bja data a senya tshepo go dinyakišišo le di-dashboard tša taolo
impactSignals: Decision cycles slow because teams debate data validity instead of action
Forecasting and planning accuracy remains inconsistent quarter over quarter over quarter
Dipeeletšo tša dinyakišišo di bontšha kamogelo ya fase ka ntle ga dihlopha tša bahlahlobi bao ba kgethegilego

approach.overview: We deliver AI and BI platforms as production systems, coupling data engineering, model lifecycle operations, and decision workflow integration.

pillars.title: Data Product Foundation
pillars.detail: Ditšweletšwa tša data tše di sepelelanago le domeine di hloma dinyakwapšalo tše di ka šomišwago gape, tše di laolwago le tša boleng bja godimo tša dinyakišišo le ML.

pillars.title: MLOps Lifecycle Automation
pillars.detail: Tlhahlo, go romelwa, go lekola le go laola drift di dirwa ka metšhene go boloka mehlala e tshepagala ka tšweletšong.

pillars.title: Decision Workflow Integration
pillars.detail: Temogo e tsentšwe ka gare ga didirišwa tša go šoma le didashboard gore dihlopha di šome ka bohlale ka gare ga ditshepedišo tša letšatši le letšatši.

principles.overview: Tlhabollo ya rena ya AI/BI e bea pele data ye e tshephagalago, mehlala ye e hlalošwago, le mekgwa ya phihlelelo ye e laolwago go ralala le kgwebo.

items.title: Single Metric Definitions
items.detail: Di-KPIs tše bohlokwa di hlalošwa gatee ka mehlala ya semantic go fediša thulano ya go bega.

items.title: Model Reliability Controls
items.detail: Performance thresholds, drift detection, and rollback mechanisms protect decision quality in production.

items.title: Tšhireletšo le Taolo ka Tlhamo
items.detail: Data lineage, role-based access, and audit-ready controls are embedded in every pipeline.

breakdown.title: Data Foundation
breakdown.summary: We audit sources, define data contracts, and establish governance so every model begins with trusted inputs.
deliverables: Mothopo wa data le tshekatsheko ya boleng

breakdown.title: Model & Insight Delivery
breakdown.summary: We build models and decision dashboards linked to measurable business questions and KPIs.

deliverables: Tshepedišo, nepagalo le tirišo ya ditaodišosengwalo

breakdown.title: Service Breakdown

problem.overview: Mekgatlo ye mentši e feleletša go huduga ga maru a mathomo eupša e sa šoma bjalo ka dihlopha tša ka lefelong leo, ka pono ye e fokolago, ditaolo tše di sa sepelelanego, le ditshenyegelo tše di oketšegago.
problem.painPointsTitle: Bohloko bja Kgwebo bjo bo Boeletšwago
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo Baetapele ba Tlwaelegilego ba se Lebelelago
painPoints: Mešomo ya mošomo e sepetšwa ka ntle le taolo ya tšhireletšo le tšhireletšo
Ditshenyegelo tša leru di gola ka lebelo go feta boleng bja kgwebo
Tshepedišo ya tikologo e dula e le ya go se lekane le go se sepelelane le dihlopha ka moka
impactSignals: Ditiragalo tša kgafetšakgafetša tšeo di hlolwago ke go fetoga ga tikologo
Tlhakišo ya tlhakišo e fokotšega ka lebaka la mekgwa ya taolo ye e arogantšwego
Infrastructure lead times delay product and data initiatives

approach.overview: We design cloud platforms as products, using infrastructure automation, policy guardrails, and migration waves aligned to business criticality.

pillars.title: Landing Zone as Code
pillars.detail: Boitšhupo, kgokagano, tšhireletšo le metheo ya pholisi di rulagantšwe gore di kgone go boeletšwa le go hlakišwa.

pillars.title: Wave-Based Migration Strategy
pillars.detail: Mešomo e sepela ka dikgato tše di laolwago ka tatelano ya go ithekga le go itokišetša go boela morago.

pillars.title: SRE + FinOps Operating Loop
pillars.detail: Dišupo tša go tshepagala le ekonomi ya yuniti di lekodišišwa mmogo go kaonafatša nako ya go šoma gabotse le go šoma gabotse.

principles.overview: Our architecture model favors declarative infrastructure, minimal-privilege access, and composable platforms that support rapid product delivery.

items.title: Dipaterone tša Mananeokgoparara tše di sa fetogego
items.detail: Tikologo e agilwe lefsa go tšwa go khoutu ya phetolelo go fokotša drift le go nolofatša tsošološo ya mošomo.

items.title: Security Baseline by Default
items.detail: Taolo ya phihlelelo ya go hloka tshepo le phethagatšo ya melawana di tseneletše tikologong ye nngwe le ye nngwe ya bophelo.

items.title: Kgotlelelo ka go phatlalatša
items.detail: Critical workloads are designed for multi-zone or multi-region failure tolerance where business impact requires it.

breakdown.title: Architecture & Landing Zone

deliverables: Mananeokgoparara bjalo ka dimojule tša khoutu

deliverables: Cost optimization backlog and governance cadence

problem.overview: Mekgatlo gantšhi e beeletša ka didirišwa tša CI/CD eupša e sa ntše e lwantšhana le ditokollo tše di sa fetogego, tumelelo ya go nanya le go arogana ga beng ba tikologo.
problem.painPointsTitle: Bohloko bja Kgwebo bjo bo Boeletšwago
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo Baetapele ba Tlwaelegilego ba se Lebelelago
painPoints: Ditlhalošo tša diphaephe di fapana go ya ka sehlopha, go hlola dikgoro tša boleng tše di sa sepelelanego
Manual deployment approvals delay hotfix and feature release timelines
Operational incidents retreat because telemetry is incomplete or siloed
impactSignals: Nako ya go eta pele ya diphetogo e tšwela pele go oketšega le ge go na le ditshenyegelo tša metšhene
Change failure rate spikes during high-volume delivery period
Tšweletšo ya batšweletši e fokotšega ka lebaka la thulano ya didirišwa le phetogo ya tikologo

approach.overview: Re hloma mohlala wa sethala sa tlhabollo sa ka gare ka dithempleite tša diphaephe tše di ka šomišwago gape, taolo ye e laolwago ke pholisi le go lebelelwa bophelo ka botlalo.

pillars.title: Golden Path Pipeline Templates
pillars.detail: Reusable CI/CD blueprints standardize build, test, security checks, and deployment workflows.

pillars.title: Platform API & Self-Service
pillars.detail: Dihlopha di fana ka tikologo le go lokolla mananeokgoparara ka dikgokagano tše di laolwago tša go itirela.

pillars.title: Reliability Feedback Loops
pillars.detail: Incident trends, SLO health, and deployment telemetry inform continuous process and architecture improvements.

principles.overview: Our DevOps architecture aligns delivery speed with governance by automating controls and minimizing one-off operational work.

items.title: Moka Pots Versioned Code
items.detail: Dipeipi, mananeokgoparara le melawana ya pholisi di laolwa ka taolo ya mothopo gore di kgone go hlakišetšwa le go boeletšwa.

items.title: Progressive Verification
items.detail: Boleng, tšhireletšo le tshekatsheko ya tiragatšo di beakantšwe ka dikgato go lemoga kotsi ka pela.

items.title: Shared Platform Responsibility
items.detail: Dihlopha tša sethala di fana ka bokgoni bja tsela mola dihlopha tša ditšweletšwa di boloka beng ba thomelo.

problem.overview: Diprotšeke tša titšithale gantši di thoma ka maikemišetšo a tiilego eupša di palelwa ke go fetogela go dipoelo tša kabo ka lebaka la go se kwagale gabotse, didirišwa tše di aroganego le dilo tše bohlokwa tše di tlago pele.
problem.painPointsTitle: Bohloko bja Kgwebo bjo bo Boeletšwago
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo Baetapele ba Tlwaelegilego ba se Lebelelago
painPoints: Phetogo ya ditsela e hlalošwa eupša ga e fetolelwe go taolo ya kabo
Dilo tše bohlokwa tša kgwebo le tša boentšeneere di fapana ka morago ga medikologo ya peakanyo ya mathomo
Legacy operating models block adoption of modern product delivery practices
impactSignals: Program spend rises while strategic KPI movement remains flat
Initiatives miss handoff points between strategy, architecture, and execution
Teams experience change fatigue with limited realized business value

approach.overview: We combine strategic advisory with delivery architecture, aligning operating model design, platform capability, and execution cadence around measurable goals.

pillars.title: Value Stream Prioritization
pillars.detail: Re rulaganya diprotšeke go ya ka seabe sa kgwebo se se lekanywago le mapheko a go ithekga ka sethekniki.

pillars.title: Target Operating Model Design
pillars.detail: Tema, taolo le ditokelo tša diphetho di hlalošwa go thekga phethagatšo ya ka pela go dihlopha tša kgwebo le tša theknolotši.

pillars.title: Portfolio Delivery Governance
pillars.detail: Tšwelopele ya phetogo e laolwa ka go lekola KPI le taolo ya kotsi ya maemo a potfolio.

principles.overview: Our transformation architecture emphasize incremental modernization and clear accountability, avoid disruptive rewrites without business justification.

items.title: Business Capability Alignment
items.detail: Diphetogo tša theknolotši di beakantšwe go ya ka bokgoni bjo bo lebanego le letseno, boleng bja tirelo goba ditshenyegelo.

items.title: Composable Platform Strategy
items.detail: Dikarolo tša sefala di kgethilwe go dirišana go thekga go huduga ga dikgato le phetogo ya ka lebelo.

items.title: Governance with Delivery Cadence
items.detail: Diforamo tša diphetho le dintlha tša taolo di tsentšwe ka gare ga medikologo ya lebelo le ya kotara, e sego go tšewa bjalo ka ditsela tše di aroganego tša bureaucratic.

breakdown.title: Strategy Alignment

deliverables: Maemo a Theknolotši le Tshepedišo ya Tshepedišo

breakdown.summary: We drive adoption, track KPI movement, and refine initiatives based on delivery results.

problem.overview: Maiteko a IoT gantši a bontšha kgonagalo ya sethekniki go bafofiši eupša a palelwa ka lebaka la kgokagano ye e sa tshepegego, taolo ye e fokolago ya dikepe, le kopanyo ye e fokolago le mešomo ya kgwebo.
problem.painPointsTitle: Bohloko bja Kgwebo bjo bo Boeletšwago
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo Baetapele ba Tlwaelegilego ba se Lebelelago
painPoints: Taolo ya didirišwa le taolo ya bophelo e dula e le ya seatla le diphošo
Diphaephe tša telemetry di tšweletša data ya lešata, yeo e sa felelago goba yeo e diegilego ya go šoma
Remote command and firmware updates introduce safety and security risk
impactSignals: Pilot environments succeed, but production rollout timelines repeats slip
Field operations teams react to incidents without predictive visibility
Ditshepedišo tša kgwebo di ka se kgone go diriša bohlale bja didirišwa ka nako ya nnete

approach.overview: We architect IoT platforms as controlled distributed systems, combining secure edge runtime standards, event-driven ingestion, and operational governance at fleet scale.

pillars.title: Secure Device Lifecycle Management
pillars.detail: Provisioning, identity, key rotation, and firmware updates are automated to reduce operational risk.

pillars.title: Event-Driven Telemetry Architecture
pillars.detail: Diphaephe tša go phatlalatša di tlwaela, di tiišetša le go sepediša ditiragalo tša didirišwa tša go sekaseka le go laola ka nako ya nnete.

pillars.title: Fleet Operations Control Plane
pillars.detail: Monitoring, alerting, and remote command workflows provide reliable supervision across distributed assets.

principles.overview: Our IoT architecture balances low-latency edge decisions with centralized governance, observability, and security compliance.

items.title: Edge Autonomy with Cloud Coordination
items.detail: Critical local operations continue during network degradation while syncing state to cloud systems when available.

items.title: Contracted Event Schemas
items.detail: Dihlopha tša didirišwa le tša sethala di diriša dithulaganyo tše di laolwago go boloka tekatekano ya telemetry go kgabaganya diphetolelo.

items.title: Tšhireletšo ya Sedirišwa sa Zero-Trust
items.detail: Mutual authentication, least privilege, and encrypted transport are enforced across every device interaction.

breakdown.title: Device & Edge Strategy
breakdown.summary: We define connectivity patterns, edge runtime standards, and secure provisioning for field devices.

breakdown.title: Telemetry & Control Plane
breakdown.summary: Re aga diphaephe tšeo di swarago ditiragalo, go dira mohlala wa mafahla a titšithale, le go kgontšha tshepedišo ya taolo ya kgole.
deliverables: Real-time ingestion and event schema design

breakdown.title: Operations & Scale
breakdown.summary: Re tsenya tirišong taolo ya dikepe le taolo ya go tshepagala ya tikologo ya IoT ya tšweletšo.
deliverables: Temošo le temošo ya didirišwa tša dikepe
